channel.title: FierceBiotech — Health, Longevity & Diet
channel.description: FierceBiotech articles filtered for longevity, health, diet, and healthspan research

item.title: Biotech Giants and Investors Gather to Solve the Commercialisation Puzzle This May in Hong Kong
item.description: Join global leaders at ASGH 2026 to bridge the gap between lab breakthroughs and market execution while unlocking growth in Asia’s health economy.

item.title: Regeneron rides into radiopharma via $2.1B biobucks pact with Australia’s Telix
item.description: With its latest obesity play appearing to pay off, Regeneron has turned its attention to radiopharmaceuticals.

item.title: In a first, a CAR-T cell therapy drives 3 autoimmune diseases into remission in a single patient
item.description: A CAR-T cell therapy has successfully treated not one, not two, but three different autoimmune diseases at once in a patient, providing further proof of the modality’s promise in the disease area as a likely first approval fast approaches.

item.title: Gilead pays Kymera $45M to glue preclinical protein degrader onto burgeoning oncology pipeline
item.description: Gilead has tucked another drug candidate into a pipeline bulging from a recent deal flurry, paying $45 million to exercise its option on Kymera Therapeutics’ preclinical anticancer molecular glue degrader.

item.title: Judge rules that HHS must face states' lawsuit over RFK Jr.'s agency overhaul, massive layoffs
item.description: A federal judge rejected the Trump administration's bid to dismiss a group of states' lawsuit challenging Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s restructuring of the Department of Health and Human Services.
